title: Fugue Test Metadata Schema (v2.4)
description: Canonical metadata schema for all Fugue v2.4 test artefacts.

test-id.description: Unique identifier for the test instance.

governance-envelope.description: ID of the governance envelope governing this test.

determinism-envelope.description: ID of the determinism envelope governing this test.

documentation-envelope.description: ID of the documentation envelope governing this test.

identity-propagation-contract.description: ID of the identity propagation contract.

namespace-scheme-contract.description: ID of the namespace scheme contract.

replay-trace-contract.description: ID of the replay trace contract.

determinism-critical.description: Whether determinism is critical for this test.

governance-critical.description: Whether governance alignment is critical for this test.

identity-critical.description: Whether identity propagation is critical for this test.

namespace-critical.description: Whether namespace correctness is critical for this test.

evaluator-critical.description: Whether evaluator behaviour is critical for this test.

replay-critical.description: Whether replay determinism is critical for this test.

last-updated.description: Date the test metadata was last updated.
